title: ligustrum glomeratum
intro: Ligustrum glomeratum, also known as Chinese Privet, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the olive family (Oleaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ligustrum glomeratum include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. Ligustrum glomeratum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and capsule, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory infections.
